name: Median Calculator
desc: Median Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
description: Calculate median of a data set.
seo_description: Use our free median calculator to quickly estimate median, quantity based on v1, v2, v3. Not registration needed.
result_context: The median is the value central when the data are ordenados. Resistente a values extremos.
formula_display: Mediana = value central (n impar) or average of dos central is (n par)
steps: Sort the values of lesser a greater
Identify if there is quantity par or impar of values
Select the value central or promediar the dos centrales
